companion.test_command: python3 -m py_compile window/window.py && python3 -m py_compile memory-server/memory_server.py
companion.description: GitHub repo — open source companion framework

sono.test_command: python3 -m py_compile window/window.py && pm2 restart companion-window && sleep 3 && curl -sf -o /dev/null http://localhost:3000
sono.description: Live companion home — Sono's working system
